name: Minnesota Minestrone
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Cabbage; Shredded (about half a head)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook and stir the meat, onion, and garlic in a Dutch oven until the meat is brown.
2. Drain off excess fat.
3. Stir in undrained tomatoes, undrained kidney beans, undrained corn, and remaining ingredients except Parmesan cheese.
4. Break up tomatoes as you stir.
5. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer, covered, until macaroni and vegetables are tender (about 30 minutes), stirring occasionally.
6. Serve hot with grated Parmesan cheese.
